Core Configuration.name: REG3
Core Configuration.description: LOCK configuration and UART pass-through control

enum_values.0b1: GMSL2 link locked and MIPI output started

fields.name: PT_SWAP
fields.description: Swap I^2C/UART pass-through 1 pin assignments with pass-through 2 pin assignments. Swaps SDA1_RX1 (MFP0) with SDA2_RX2 (MFP5), and SCL1_TX1 (MFP1) with SCL2_TX2 (MFP6).

fields.name: DIS_REM_CC_B
fields.description: Disable access to Link B serializer control channel over GMSL2 connection from RX/SDA and TX/SCL pins

Core Configuration.name: REG4
Core Configuration.description: Link B transmitter and receiver rate control

fields.name: TX_RATE_B
fields.description: Link B Transmitter Rate When changing this value, restart the link with a write to the RESET_ONESHOT or RESET_LINK register for the new value to take effect.

fields.name: RX_RATE_B
fields.description: Link B Receiver Rate When changing this value, restart the link with a write to the RESET_ONESHOT or RESET_LINK register for the new value to take effect. Default value is set by configuration pins at power-up.

Core Configuration.name: REG5
Core Configuration.description: Line fault monitor and output enable control register

fields.name: LOCK_EN
fields.description: Enable LOCK output. 0b0: LOCK output disabled 0b1: LOCK output enabled

fields.name: ERRB_EN
fields.description: Enable ERRB output. 0b0: ERRB output disabled 0b1: ERRB output enabled

fields.name: LOCK_ALT_EN
fields.description: Enable LOCK alternate output. 0b0: LOCK output disabled 0b1: LOCK output enabled

fields.name: PU_LF3
fields.description: Power up line-fault monitor 3. 0b0: Line-fault monitor 3 disabled 0b1: Line-fault monitor 3 enabled

fields.name: PU_LF2
fields.description: Power up line-fault monitor 2. 0b0: Line-fault monitor 2 disabled 0b1: Line-fault monitor 2 enabled

fields.name: PU_LF1
fields.description: Power up line-fault monitor 1. 0b0: Line-fault monitor 1 disabled 0b1: Line-fault monitor 1 enabled

fields.name: PU_LF0
fields.description: Power up line-fault monitor 0. 0b0: Line-fault monitor 0 disabled 0b1: Line-fault monitor 0 enabled

fields.name: I2CSEL
fields.description: I^2C/UART selection Bit is set according to the CFG0 pin value at power-up. Changing this value through a register write is not recommended. Instead, change the CFG0 pin voltage and power up the device again. 0: UART 1: I^2C

fields.name: DEV_REV
fields.description: Device Revision. Refer to the device Errata sheet for correct RESET value.

fields.name: RESET_ONE_SHOT
fields.description: One-Shot Link Reset Reset entire data path on Link A (keep register settings). Write 1 to activate reset, bit self clears and automatically releases reset.

fields.name: DP_RST_MIPI2_CHKB
fields.description: Select reset mode to MIPI controllers. Set this bit to 1, if required, to have completely independent resets, and linkup of Link A and Link B.

fields.name: RESET_LINK
fields.description: Link Reset Resets entire data path on Link A (keep register settings). Write 1 to activate reset, write 0 to release reset.

fields.name: RESET_ON_ESHOT_B
fields.description: Reset entire data path on Link B (keep register settings). Write 1 to activate reset, bit self clears and automatically releases reset.

fields.name: REG_MNL
fields.description: Enable regulator manual mode to allow regulator to be forced on or off through REG_ENABLE (0x10).

Device Status.name: REG26
Device Status.description: Line fault status register for LMN0 and LMN1

fields.name: LF_1
fields.description: Line-fault status of wire connected to LMN1 pin

fields.name: LF_0
fields.description: Line-fault status of wire connected to LMN0 pin

fields.description: Override non-GPIO port function IO setting. When set, RES_CFG, PULL_UPDN_SEL, OUT_TYPE, and GPIO_OUT_DIS are effective when pin is configured as non- GPIO. When cleared, non-GPIO pin function determines IO type.

GPIO.description: GPIOA register for forward compensation delay

fields.name: GPIO_FWD_CDLY
fields.description: Compensation delay multiplier for the forward direction. For Link A. This must be the same value as GPIO_FWD_CDLY of the chip on the other side of the link. Total delay is the (value + 1) multiplied by 1.7μs. Default delay is 3.4μs.

GPIO.name: GPIO_A

fields.name: TX_COMP_EN_B
fields.description: Enables jitter minimization compensation. 0b0: Jitter compensation disabled 0b1: Jitter compensation enabled

fields.name: GPIO_RX_EN_B
fields.description: GPIO out source control. Set to 1 to receive GPIO value from GMSL link. Set GPIO_OUT_DIS to 0 to output the received value on the local MFP. 0b0: This GPIO source disabled for GMSL2 reception 0b1: This GPIO source enabled for GMSL2 reception

fields.name: GPIO_TX_EN_B
fields.description: GPIO Tx source control. Set to 1 to transmit the local MFP input value across the GMSL link. 0b0: This GPIO source disabled for GMSL2 transmission 0b1: This GPIO source enabled for GMSL2 transmission

fields.name: SLV_SH
fields.description: I^2 C-to-I^2 C subordinate-setup and hold-time setting. Configures the interval between SDA and SCL transitions when driven by the internal I^2 C subordinate. 0b00: Set for I^2 C Fast-mode Plus speed (1Mbps) 0b01: Set for I^2 C Fast-mode speed (400Kbps) 0b10: Set for I^2 C standard-mode speed (100Kbps) 0b11: Reserved

fields.name: SLV_TO
fields.description: I^2 C-to-I^2 C subordinate timeout setting. Internal GMSL2 I^2 C subordinate times out after the configured duration if it does not receive any response while waiting for a packet from remote device. 0b000: 16μs 0b001: 1ms 0b010: 2ms 0b011: 4ms 0b100: 8ms 0b101: 16ms 0b110: 32ms 0b111: Disabled

fields.name: SRC_A
fields.description: I^2 C address translator source A for main control channel. When an I^2 C transaction across the GMSL link has a device address matching I^2 C SRC_A, the device address as seen on the remote side is replaced by the device address in I^2 C DST_A.

I2C.name: I2C_3
I2C.description: I2C address translator destination A for main control channel

fields.name: DST_A
fields.description: I^2 C address translator destination A for main control channel. See the description of I^2 C SRC_A.

I2C.name: I2C_4
I2C.description: I2C address translator source B for main control channel

fields.name: SRC_B
fields.description: I^2 C address translator source B for main control channel. When an I^2 C transaction across the GMSL link has a device address matching I^2 C SRC_B, the device address as seen on the remote side is replaced by the device address in I^2 C DST_B.

fields.name: DST_B
fields.description: I^2 C address translator destination B for main control channel. See the description of I^2 C SRC_B.

fields.name: BYPASS_DIS_PAR
fields.description: Selects whether or not to receive and send parity bit in Bypass mode. 0b0: Receive and send parity bit in Bypass mode 0b1: Do not receive and send parity

fields.name: BYPASS_TO
fields.description: UART bypass mode. 0b0: UART soft-bypass mode disabled 0b1: UART soft-bypass mode enabled | UART bypass mode not controlled by local MS pin 0b1: UART bypass mode controlled by local MS pin

fields.name: OUT_DELAY
fields.description: UART initial output delay In Base mode, first received UART byte of a packet (Sync or Ack frame) is delayed by the configured number of bit times to output the UART frames of the same packet back-to-back on the remote side. This delay avoids a gap between the first byte and remaining bytes.

fields.name: BITLEN_MSB
fields.description: UART detected bit length, high 6 bits. Detected UART pin BAUD rate in terms of 150MHz clock cycles.

UART.name: UART_0

fields.name: REM_MS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART Bypass mode control by remote GPIO pin. When set, remote chip's GPIO is used as MS pin (UART mode select). When MS is high, chip is in Bypass mode; otherwise, chip is in Base mode.

fields.name: LOC_MS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART Bypass mode control by local GPIO pin. Set to use GPIO2 pin as MS pin (UART mode select). When MS is high, chip is in Bypass mode; otherwise, chip is in Base mode.

fields.name: BYPASS_TO_1
fields.description: UART soft-bypass timeout duration. When set to 11, BYPASS_EN is never cleared, so the device stays in Bypass mode until next power down.

fields.name: BYPASS_EN_1
fields.description: Enable UART soft-bypass mode. Bypass mode remains active as long as there is UART activity. When there is no UART activity for selected duration (configured by BYPASS_TO bitfield), device exits Bypass mode, and the bit is automatically cleared.

fields.name: TUN_DATA_CRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: For tunneling mode, enable reporting at ERRB pin of DPHY/CPHY data CRC errors

fields.name: TUN_ECC_UNCORR_ERR_OEN
fields.description: For tunneling mode, enable reporting at ERRB pin of uncorrectable errors on DPHY ECC or CPHY header CRC

fields.name: TUN_ECC_CORR_ERR_OEN
fields.description: For tunneling mode, enable reporting at ERRB pin of correctable errors on DPHY ECC or CPHY header CRC

fields.name: VID_OVERFLOW_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of video pipe overflow (VID_OVERFLOW) at ERRB pin

fields.name: TUN_DATA_CRC_ERR
fields.description: For tunneling mode, DPHY/CPHY data CRC errors Combined for all MIPI PHYs. Read individual MIPI_TX STATUS registers to clear.

fields.name: TUN_ECC_UNCORR_ERR
fields.description: For tunneling mode, uncorrectable errors on DPHY ECC or CPHY header CRC Combined for all MIPI PHYs. Read individual MIPI_TX STATUS registers to clear.

fields.name: TUN_ECC_CORR_ERR
fields.description: For tunneling mode, correctable errors on DPHY ECC or CPHY header CRC. Combined for all MIPI PHYs. Read individual MIPI_TX STATUS registers to clear.

fields.name: VID_OVERFLOW_FLAG
fields.description: Combined error status of all video pipe overflow (VID_OVERFLOW) bits. Read individual VID_OVERFLOW bits to clear.

fields.name: FSYNC_MODE
fields.description: Frame Synchronization Mode. GMSL2/3: 0b00: Frame sync generation is on. FSYNC_OUT pin is not used as FSYNC output, but a GPIO on the remote side can be used 0b01: Frame sync generation is on. FSYNC_OUT pin is used as FSYNC output and drives subordinate device, and a GPIO on the remote side can be used 0b10: Frame sync generation is off. FSYNC_OUT pin is not used as FSYNC output. 0b11:

fields.name: FSYNC_METH
fields.description: Frame Synchronization Method. 0b00: Manual 0b01: Semi-auto 0b10: Auto 0b11: Reserved

fields.name: FSYNC_PER_DIV
fields.description: Frame sync transmission period in terms of VSYNC periods

fields.name: MST_LINK_SEL
fields.description: Main link select for frame sync generation

fields.name: K_VAL
fields.description: Desired frame sync margin (microseconds, typical) with respect to the V SYNC of the slowest link in auto mode or with respect to the V SYNC of the main link in semi-auto mode.

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_4
FSYNC.description: Frame sync P value high bits and sign register

fields.name: P_VAL_SIGN
fields.description: Sign bit of P_VAL. 0b0: P_VAL is positive 0b1: P_VAL is negative

fields.name: P_VAL_H
fields.description: High bits of desired frame sync margin in terms of PCLK cycles with respect to the V SYNC of the slowest link in auto mode or with respect to the V SYNC of the main link in semi-auto mode. 0b00000: High bits of PCLK cycles frame sync margin

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_9
FSYNC.description: Frame sync difference error threshold high bits register

fields.name: FRM_DIFF_ERR_THR_H
fields.description: High bits of VSYNC error threshold in PCLK cycles

FSYNC.name: FSYNC_11
FSYNC.description: Frame sync overlap window high bits and FSIN last register

fields.name: EN_FSIN_LAST
fields.description: FSIN position. 0b0: FSIN can occur anywhere with respect to VS rising edges 0b1: FSIN occurs after all rising edges

fields.name: OVLP_WINDOW_H
fields.description: Low byte of the overlap window value in terms of PCLK cycles. The window starts from the VS rising edge from the fastest image sensor and ends when a frame sync signal is seen. The default is 60μs for 96MHz PCLK. The function is disabled when all 13 bits are zeros.

fields.name: FS_GPIO_TYPE
fields.description: Select the type of FSYNC signal to output from GPIO. 0x0: GSML1 type 0x1: GMSL2 type

fields.name: FS_USE_XTAL
fields.description: Use crystal oscillator clock for generating frame sync signal. 0x0: Disabled 0x1: Enabled

fields.name: AUTO_FS_LINKS
fields.description: Select how links are selected for frame sync generation. 0x0: Include links selected by FS_LINK_x register bits in frame sync generation 0x1: Include all enabled links in frame sync generation

fields.name: FS_EN_Z
fields.description: Include Video Pipe Z in frame-sync generation This is used only if AUTO_FS_LINKS = 0. 0x0: Do not include Video Pipe Z in frame-sync generation 0x1: Include Video Pipe Z in frame-sync generation

fields.name: FS_EN_Y
fields.description: Include Video Pipe Y in frame-sync generation This is used only if AUTO_FS_LINKS = 0. 0x0: Do not include Video Pipe Y in frame-sync generation 0x1: Include Video Pipe Y in frame-sync generation

fields.name: EN_SYNC_COMP
fields.description: Bypass FSYNC sync complete term in CSI_OUT_EN (0x313). Enabling sync complete may cause video out to stop if a GMSL link drop occurs during internal frame sync configurations.

fields.name: EN_LINK_RESET
fields.description: Internal Frame Sync Reset Link Enable If enabled, may not operate correctly if GMSL link drop occurs.

fields.name: FSYNC_OVR_Z
fields.description: Override of video_lock_1 during internal frame sync configuration using FS_LINK_X. If logic 1, Link 1 continues to be seen by frame sync state machines even if GMSL link drop occurs. Not used in AUTO_FS_LINKS mode.

fields.name: FSYNC_OVR_Y
fields.description: Override of video_lock_1 during internal frame sync configuration using FS_LINK_X If logic 1, Link 1 continues to be seen by frame sync state machines even if GMSL link drop occurs. Not used in AUTO_FS_LINKS mode.

fields.name: CSI2_LANE_CNT

fields.name: CSI2_CPHY_EN
fields.description: Enable CPHY. 0b0: CPHY disabled 0b1: CPHY enabled

fields.name: ALT_MEM_MAP12

fields.name: PERIODIC_COMPUTE
fields.description: Perform CRC check on a periodic basis, based on CRC_PERIOD value.

fields.name: CHECK_CRC
fields.description: Upon calculation of CRC, compare with previous calculation, except on first time through. On miscompare, issue ERRB.

fields.name: AUTO_ERR_RST_EN
fields.description: Automatically resets DEC_ERR_A (0x22), DEC_ERR_B (0x23), and IDLE_ERR (0x24) bitfields after ERRB pin is asserted for 1μs.

fields.name: DEC_ERR_THR
fields.description: Decoding and Idle-Error Reporting Threshold DEC_ERR_FLAG_A (0x1B) is asserted when DEC_ERR_A (0x22) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR. DEC_ERR_FLAG_B (0x1B) is asserted when DEC_ERR_B (0x23) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR. IDLE_ERR_FLAG (0x1B) is asserted when IDLE_ERR (0x24) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR. IDLE_ERR_FLAG_B (0x5011) is asserted when IDLE_ERR_B (0x5024) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR.

fields.name: PKT_CNT_EXP
fields.description: Packet-Count Multiplier Exponent See the description of PKT_CNT (register CNT3) bitfield.

fields.name: AUTO_CNT_RST_EN
fields.description: Automatically resets PKT_CNT bitfield (register CNT3) after ERRB pin is asserted for 1μs.

fields.name: PKT_CNT_THR
fields.description: Packet-count reporting threshold See the description of PKT_CNT (register CNT3). PKT_CNT_FLAG is asserted when PKT_CNT ≥ PKT_CNT_THR.

Interrupts.name: INTR2
Interrupts.description: Interrupt enable register for error reporting at ERRB pin

fields.name: REM_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enables reporting of remote-error status (REM_ERR_FLAG - 0x1B) at ERRB pin

fields.name: LFLT_INT_OEN
fields.description: Enables reporting of line-fault interrupt (LFLT_INT - 0x1B ) at ERRB pin

fields.name: IDLE_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enables reporting of idle-word errors (IDLE_ERR_FLAG - 0x1B) at ERRB pin

fields.name: DEC_ERR_OEN_B
fields.description: Enables reporting of decoding errors (DEC_ERR_FLAG_B - 0x1B) at ERRB pin

fields.name: DEC_ERR_OEN_A
fields.description: Enable reporting of decoding errors (DEC_ERR_FLAG_A - 0x1B) at ERRB pin

Interrupts.name: INTR6
Interrupts.description: Interrupt enable register for video and power errors

fields.name: VDDCMP_INT_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of VDDCMP interrupt (VDDCMP_INT_FLAG - 0x1F) at ERRB pin

fields.name: VDDBAD_INT_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of VDDBAD interrupt (VDDBAD_INT_FLAG - 0x1F) at ERRB pin

fields.name: FSYNC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of frame-sync errors (FSYNC_ERR_FLAG - 0x1F) at ERRB pin

fields.name: LCRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of video-line CRC errors (LCRC_ERR_FLAG - 0x1F) at ERRB pin

fields.name: VPRBS_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of video PRBS errors (VPRBS_ERR_FLAG - 0x1F) at ERRB pin

fields.name: VID_PXL_CRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of GMSL link packet CRC errors for video pixel data at ERRB pin

fields.name: ERR_TX_EN
fields.description: Transmit local error status (inverse of ERRB pin level) to Link A remote side through GPIO channel

fields.name: ERR_TX_EN_B
fields.description: Transmit local-error status (inverse of ERRB pin level) to Link B remote side through GPIO channel

fields.name: ERR_TX_ID
fields.description: GPIO ID used for transmitting ERR_TX

fields.name: ERR_RX_EN
fields.description: Receive Link A remote-error status (inverse of ERRB pin level) through GPIO channel

fields.name: ERR_RX_EN_B
fields.description: Receive Link B remote-error status (inverse of ERRB pin level) through GPIO channel

fields.name: ERR_RX_ID
fields.description: GPIO ID used for receiving ERR_RX

Interrupts.name: INTR10

fields.name: RTTN_CRC_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Retention Memory Restore CRC Error Output Enable

fields.name: IDLE_ERR_OEN_B
fields.description: Idle error output enable for Link B

fields.name: FEC_RX_ERR_OEN_B
fields.description: FEC RX error output enable for Link B

fields.name: MAX_RT_OEN_B
fields.description: Max retry output enable for Link B

fields.name: RT_CNT_OEN_B
fields.description: Retry count output enable for Link B

fields.name: PKT_CNT_OEN_B
fields.description: Packet count output enable for Link B

fields.description: When an I^2C transaction across the GMSL link has a device address matching I^2C SRC_A_1, the device address as seen on the remote side is replaced by the device address in I^2C DST_A_1.

fields.name: DST_A_1
fields.description: I^2 C address translator destination A for pass-through 1 port

fields.name: SRC_B_1
fields.description: I^2 C source B address for pass-through 1 port

fields.name: DST_B_1
fields.description: I^2 C address translator destination B for pass-through port 1

fields.name: SRC_A_2
fields.description: I^2 C source A address for pass-through 2 port

fields.name: DST_A_2
fields.description: I^2 C address translator destination A for pass-through 2 port

fields.name: SRC_B_2
fields.description: I^2 C source B address for pass-through 2 port

fields.name: VID_PXL_CRC_ERR0
fields.description: Total number of video pixel CRC errors detected at video streams. Reset after reading or with the rising edge of LOCK.

fields.name: VID_PXL_CRC_ERR1
fields.description: Total number of video pixel CRC errors detected at video streams. Reset after reading or with the rising edge of LOCK.

fields.name: VID_PXL_CRC_ERR2
fields.description: Total number of video pixel CRC errors detected at video streams. Reset after reading or with the rising edge of LOCK.

fields.name: VID_PXL_CRC_ERR3
fields.description: Total number of video pixel CRC errors detected at video streams. Reset after reading or with the rising edge of LOCK.

fields.name: TUN_ONLY_2
fields.description: Disable control channel access from RX2/ SDA2 and TX2/SCL2

fields.name: TUN_ONLY_1
fields.description: Disable control channel access from RX1/ SDA1 and TX1/SCL1

fields.name: TUN_ONLY_CC
fields.description: Disable control channel access from RX/SDA and TX/SCL

Port Control.name: UNLOCK_KEY
Port Control.description: Unlock key register for port control access

fields.name: UNLOCK_KEY
fields.description: Register must be at unlock value to enable write access to port control pins. Defaults to unlocked.

fields.name: PIO03_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for PIO03 (MFP3). 00=fastest, 11=slowest.

fields.name: PIO02_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for PIO02 (MFP2). 00=fastest, 11=slowest.

fields.name: PIO01_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for PIO01 (MFP1). 00=fastest, 11=slowest.

fields.name: PIO00_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for PIO00 (MFP0). 00=fastest, 11=slowest.

fields.name: PIO07_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for this PIO. 00 value is the fastest rise and fall time, and 11 value is the slowest. This PIO corresponds to MFP5.

fields.name: PIO04_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for this PIO. 00 value is the fastest rise and fall time, and 11 value is the slowest. This PIO corresponds to MFP4.

fields.name: PIO08_SLEW
fields.description: Rise and fall time speed setting on pad ring for this PIO. 00 value is the fastest rise and fall time, and 11 value is the slowest. This PIO corresponds to MFP6.

FEC Error Counters.name: CORRECTED_THRESHOLD_0
FEC Error Counters.description: Threshold (decimal value) for number of bit errors seen before FEC error is asserted. Bits 7:0. Set this to the maximum value so that the FEC error flag is not asserted and any correctable errors that occurred are successfully corrected.

fields.name: BIT_ERRS_CORRECTED_THRESHOLD_0
fields.description: Threshold (decimal value) for number of bit errors seen before FEC error is asserted. Bits 7:0. Set this to the maximum value so that the FEC error flag is not asserted and any correctable errors that occurred are successfully corrected.

Other.name: REG1
Other.description: I2C and link rate configuration register

fields.name: DIS_LOCAL_CC
fields.description: Disable control channel connection to RX/SDA and TX/SCL pins

fields.name: VID_EN_Z
fields.description: Enable data transmission through video pipe Z

fields.name: VID_EN_Y
fields.description: Enable data transmission through video pipe Y

Other.name: VIDEO_PIPE_EN

fields.name: VID_BLK_LEN_ERR
fields.description: Video Rx video pixel data block-length error detected. A length mismatch happens when the received data length does not match what is expected for the video data bits per pixel. 0b0: No error detected 0b1: Video Rx block-length error detected

fields.name: VID_LOCK
fields.description: Video pipeline locked. Can also read the following registers to check if MIPI TX is outputting data: csi2_tx1/2_pkt_cnt, csi2_dup1/2_pkt_cnt, phy0/1/2/3_pkt_cnt. 0b0: Video pipeline not locked 0b1: Video pipeline locked

fields.name: MASK_VIDEO_DE
fields.description: Masks video when DE is low 0x0: Do not mask when DE is low 0x1: Mask when DE is low

fields.name: VIDEO_PIPE_SEL_Z
fields.description: Selects the incoming stream ID to receive in Video Pipe Z

fields.name: VIDEO_PIPE_SEL_Y
fields.description: Selects the incoming stream ID to receive in Video Pipe Y

fields.name: SPI_LINK_SELECT
fields.description: Selects link connection for SPI Port. 0x0: Link A 0x1: Link B

fields.name: UART_2_LINK_SELECT
fields.description: UART Pass-Through 2 Link Connection Select. 0x0: Link A 0x1: Link B

fields.name: UART_1_LINK_SELECT
fields.description: UART Pass-Through 1 Link Connection Select. 0x0: Link A 0x1: Link B

fields.name: UART_0_LINK_SELECT
fields.description: Control Channel UART Link Connection Select. 0x0: Link A 0x1: Link B

fields.name: SPI_LOC_ID
fields.description: Program to local ID if filtering packets based on header ID.

fields.name: SPI_CC_TRG_ID
fields.description: ID for GMSL2 header in SPI control-channel bridge mode

fields.name: SPI_IGNR_ID
fields.description: Selects if SPI should use or ignore header ID to decide on packet acceptance

fields.name: MST_SLVN
fields.description: Selects if SPI is main or subordinate

Other.name: SPI_2
quality_issues: all fields have default RW access (may be missing real access types)

fields.name: SPI_MOD3_F
fields.description: Allows the suppression of an extra SCK prior to SS deassertion when SPI mode 3 is selected. 0b0: Extra SCK present prior to SS deassertion when in SPI mode 3 0b1: Extra SCK suppressed prior to SS deassertion when in SPI mode 3

Other.name: SPI_6
Other.description: SPI GPIO control and status register

fields.name: BNE
fields.description: Alternate GPU status register to use for BNE status if GPIO is not available 0b0: Buffer empty 0b1: Buffer not empty

fields.name: SPIS_RWN
fields.description: Alternate GPU control register to use for read and write control if GPIO is not available. 0b0: Write 0b1: Read

fields.name: SS_IO_EN_2
fields.description: Enable GPIO for use as Subordinate Select 2 output. 0b0: GPIO not used for SPI SS2 function 0b1: GPIO used for SPI SS2 function

fields.name: SS_IO_EN_1
fields.description: Enable GPIO for use as Subordinate Select 1 output. 0b0: GPIO not used for SPI SS1 function 0b1: GPIO used for SPI SS1 function

fields.name: BNE_IO_EN
fields.description: Enable GPIO for use as BNE output for SPI data available status. 0b0: GPIO not used for SPI BNE function 0b1: GPIO used for SPI BNE function

fields.name: RWN_IO_EN
fields.description: Enable GPIO for use as RO input for control of SPI data movement. 0b0: GPIO not used for SPI RO function 0b1: GPIO used for SPI RO function

Other.name: SPI_8
Other.description: SPI 8 request hold off timeout register

Other.name: WM_2
Other.description: Watermark polarity and filter control register

fields.name: WM_MASKMODE
fields.description: Sets watermark video mask behavior for the device

fields.name: WM_DETOUT
fields.description: Live value of frame-based detection output

fields.name: WM_ERROR
fields.description: Live value of active-high watermark error

fields.name: REM_ERR_FLAG
fields.description: Received remote-side error status (inverse of remote side ERRB pin level)

fields.name: LFLT_INT
fields.description: Line-Fault Interrupt Asserted when any one of line-fault monitors indicates a fault status. See LF_0 (0x26) and LF_1 (0x26) bitfields for more information.

fields.name: IDLE_ERR_FLAG
fields.description: Idle-Word-Error Flag for Link A Asserted when IDLE_ERR (0x23) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR (0x18). For Link A only.

fields.name: DEC_ERR_FLAG_B
fields.description: Decoding Error Flag for Link B Asserted when DEC_ERR_B (0x23) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR (0x18).

fields.name: DEC_ERR_FLAG_A
fields.description: Decoding Error Flag for Link A Asserted when DEC_ERR_A (0x22) ≥ DEC_ERR_THR (0x18).

Other.name: INTR4
Other.description: Interrupt enable register for advanced error reporting

fields.name: EOM_ERR_OEN_B
fields.description: Enable reporting of eye-opening monitor (EOM) error (EOM_ERR_FLAG_B - 0x1D ) for Link B at ERRB pin.

fields.name: EOM_ERR_OEN_A
fields.description: Enable reporting of eye-opening monitor error (EOM_ERR_FLAG_A - 0x1D) for Link A at ERRB pin.

fields.name: FEC_RX_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of Link A FEC receive errors exceeding thresholds (FEC_ERR_FLAG - 0x1D) at ERRB pin.

fields.name: MAX_RT_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of Link A combined ARQ maximum retransmission limit error flag (MAX_RT_FLAG - 0x1D) at ERRB pin.

fields.name: RT_CNT_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of Link A combined ARQ retransmission event flag (RT_CNT_FLAG - 0x1D) at ERRB pin.

fields.name: PKT_CNT_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of Link A packet count flag (PKT_CNT_FLAG - 0x1D) at ERRB pin.

fields.name: WM_ERR_OEN
fields.description: Enable reporting of watermark errors (WM_ERR_FLAG - 0x1D) at ERRB pin
